items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: A benefit-harm trade-off study via an online survey involving 92 recreationally or competitively active individuals estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management on knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究量化了ACL重建术与非手术管理在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的“最小有益效应”。在与患者进行共享决策时，你可以引用这些量化数据，帮助患者理解不同干预方案的潜在效益与风险权衡。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗相比的最小有益效应：一项效益-危害权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对92名休闲或竞技运动参与者进行的在线效益-危害权衡研究，评估了ACL重建与非手术管理在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study quantifies the "smallest worthwhile effect" of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management on knee function and return to sport. Use these quantified data in shared decision-making to help patients understand the potential benefits and risks of different intervention options.
items.limitation: 本研究基于在线调查，数据可能存在回忆偏倚和选择偏倚，且评估的效应为患者主观认知，非客观生理指标。
items.limitationEn: This study is based on an online survey, and data may be subject to recall and selection bias; the effect assessed is patient-perceived, not objective physiological metrics.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper discusses that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease patients.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论肯定了移动端肺康复与中心肺康复在改善 COPD 患者运动能力方面具有相似效果，且在健康状况改善方面更优。这支持了远程康复模式的可行性，为无法前往中心的患者提供了重要的替代方案。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：移动端肺康复在改善慢阻肺运动能力上与中心肺康复相当，且对健康状况改善更优
items.summaryZh: 这篇批判性评估论文讨论指出，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者，移动端肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心肺康复效果相当，但在改善健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary affirms that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is similarly effective in improving exercise capacity and superior in health status for COPD patients compared to center-based programs. This supports the feasibility of remote rehabilitation models, offering an important alternative for patients unable to attend in-center programs.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: This review of 1,548 RCTs on post-stroke lower extremity rehabilitation found that low-to-middle-income countries (LMICs) more frequently use generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures relying on patient observation compared to high-income countries (HICs).
items.curatedReason: 本系统综述提示，中低收入国家（LMICs）和高收入国家（HICs）在卒中下肢康复试验中使用的结局测量指标存在差异。评估和解读跨国研究时，需留意所选OM对结果可比性的影响。
items.titleZh: 卒中下肢康复试验中结局测量指标使用模式的跨国差异：中低收入国家与高收入国家的比较
items.summaryZh: 这项对1548项卒中下肢康复RCT的综述发现，与高收入国家相比，中低收入国家更多使用依赖患者观察的通用性功能障碍和日常生活活动结局测量指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review suggests differences in outcome measure utilization in stroke lower extremity rehabilitation trials between low-to-middle-income countries (LMICs) and high-income countries (HICs). When evaluating and interpreting cross-national research, be mindful of how OM selection impacts result comparability.
items.limitation: 本综述未报告不同结局测量指标在测量敏感性或临床相关性方面的具体差异，可能无法完全解释其对康复效果评估的潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: This review did not report specific differences in measurement sensitivity or clinical relevance of various outcome measures, which may limit its ability to fully explain their potential impact on rehabilitation outcome assessment.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: A prospective observational study of 92 AUVP patients found significant changes in anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) after an 8-week visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) program, suggesting AcS as a potential marker for central compensation.
items.curatedReason: 本观察研究表明，急性单侧前庭病变（AUVP）患者在8周视动-前庭物理治疗（VVPT）后，抗补偿性扫视（AcS）显著改善，这提示AcS可能是前庭康复中央代偿的有效生物标志物。在临床实践中，可考虑将SHIMP评估纳入VVPT效果监测。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病变患者视动-前庭物理治疗后抗补偿性扫视的变化：一项前瞻性观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对92名急性单侧前庭病变患者的前瞻性观察性研究发现，经过8周视动-前庭物理治疗后，抗补偿性扫视（AcS）显著改善，提示AcS可作为中央代偿的潜在标志物。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study indicates significant improvement in anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) after 8 weeks of visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy (AUVP), suggesting AcS could be a useful biomarker for central compensation in vestibular rehabilitation. Consider incorporating SHIMP assessment into VVPT effectiveness monitoring in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法排除混杂因素对VVPT效果的影响，且未设置对照组。
items.limitationEn: This observational study cannot rule out confounding factors influencing VVPT effectiveness and lacks a control group.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: A multi-method study integrating a narrative review, a two-round Delphi process with 15 experts, and multi-criteria decision-making identified and quantitatively prioritized fall-prevention strategies for people with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项综合研究通过专家共识和多准则决策，为帕金森病跌倒预防策略提供了量化优先级。它肯定了多学科干预和运动策略的核心地位。在制定康复计划时，应优先考虑报告中排名靠前的策略。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先排序：一项多方法评估
items.summaryZh: 一项结合叙述性综述、15位专家两轮德尔菲共识和多准则决策的多方法研究，识别并量化了帕金森病患者跌倒预防策略的优先级。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comprehensive study provides quantitatively prioritized fall prevention strategies for Parkinson's disease through expert consensus and multi-criteria decision-making. It affirms the central role of multidisciplinary interventions and exercise strategies. Prioritize the top-ranked strategies from the report when developing rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 专家共识可能存在主观性偏差，且结果未经过临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: Expert consensus may introduce subjective bias, and the results have not been validated in clinical trials.

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study examined 4-week inpatient rehabilitation outcomes in post-stroke hemiplegia patients, finding associations between neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with poorer functional status, quality of life, and depressive symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究提示，卒中后的神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化可能与康复预后不良相关。在康复评估中，除了关注运动功能，也应筛查和管理疼痛的心理社会维度，这可能影响患者依从性和最终功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与卒中患者康复预后的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究考察了卒中后偏瘫患者4周住院康复预后，发现神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与较差的功能状态、生活质量和抑郁症状相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study suggests that neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing after stroke may be associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes. In rehabilitation assessments, in addition to motor function, screen for and manage the psychosocial dimensions of pain, as this can impact patient adherence and ultimate functional recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心前瞻性观察研究，样本量较小，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center prospective observational study with a small sample size, potentially subject to selection bias and confounding factors, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (1,372 participants) found that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]; p < .01) in knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析提供了短波透热疗法（SWD）治疗膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）的有力证据，显示其能显著改善疼痛（平均改善-2.13点，95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]）和步行能力（平均改善-0.72点，95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]）。在KOA的物理治疗方案中，可以更肯定地考虑使用SWD。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝关节骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含17项试验（1372名参与者）的系统综述与荟萃分析发现，短波透热疗法（SWD）能显著改善膝关节骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均-2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和步行能力（平均-0.72；95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis provides strong evidence for shortwave diathermy (SWD) in treating knee osteoarthritis (KOA), showing significant improvements in pain (mean -2.13, 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.72, 95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]). You can more confidently consider using SWD in KOA physical therapy protocols.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性高（I² ≥ 75%），可能影响结果的稳定性与解释。
items.limitationEn: The included studies exhibit high heterogeneity (I² ≥ 75%), which may affect the stability and interpretation of the results.

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT with 24 ACLR male athletes who had returned to sport showed that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors compared to control.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后运动员的视觉扰动训练改善了非预期切向动作中的下肢生物力学和运动错误，提示在重返运动训练中，除了传统的肌肉力量和本体感觉训练，也应纳入认知和视觉整合任务，以更全面地恢复神经肌肉控制，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 视觉扰动训练对ACL重建男性运动员非预期切向动作下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对24名已重返运动的ACL重建男性运动员的随机对照试验显示，8周的视觉扰动训练显著改善了非预期切向动作的下肢生物力学并减少了错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual perturbation training improved lower-limb biomechanics and movement errors during unanticipated cutting in ACLR athletes. This suggests that in return-to-sport training, integrate cognitive and visual tasks alongside traditional strength and proprioception exercises for more comprehensive neuromuscular control restoration and reduced reinjury risk.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小，仅限于男性运动员，可能无法完全推广到所有ACL重建人群，且长期效果尚未明确。
items.limitationEn: This study had a small sample size and was limited to male athletes, so the results may not be fully generalizable to all ACLR populations, and long-term effects are not yet clear.

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial explored a digital physiotherapy supported self-management program (TRAK MSK) for adults with self-reported activity-related joint pain, comparing it with usual NHS physiotherapy care over 16 weeks.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 数字自我管理项目在可行性研究中展现了潜力，但目前只是初步证据。在其大型 RCT 结果公布前，应将其视为辅助工具，而不是替代传统物理治疗。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗辅助自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 这项为期16周的两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验，对比了针对报告关节疼痛的成年人的数字物理治疗辅助自我管理项目（TRAK MSK）与常规NHS物理治疗的异同。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK digital self-management program shows potential in this feasibility study, but it's preliminary evidence. Until results from a definitive RCT are available, consider it an adjunct rather than a replacement for traditional physiotherapy.
items.limitation: 本研究为可行性试验，样本量相对较小，结果主要用于评估大规模RCT的可行性而非干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This was a feasibility trial with a relatively small sample size, primarily evaluating the feasibility of a larger RCT rather than the intervention's effectiveness.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: An online survey among Swedish physiotherapists found major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement surgery due to limited supporting evidence, potentially impacting patient outcomes and fear of movement.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示瑞典物理治疗师在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议上存在显著差异。在缺乏统一循证指南的情况下，应注意自身建议的一致性和患者教育的充分性，避免给患者造成困惑。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：瑞典物理治疗师调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的在线调查发现，由于循证依据有限，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在显著差异，这可能影响患者预后和运动恐惧。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals significant discrepancies in long-term activity restriction recommendations after knee replacement among Swedish physiotherapists. In the absence of unified evidence-based guidelines, ensure your recommendations are consistent and patient education is thorough to avoid confusion.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅能揭示相关性，无法确定因果关系，且结果基于瑞典特定人群。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey can only show associations, not causation, and its findings are specific to the Swedish population.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: A systematic review using COSMIN methodology evaluated the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke, finding high certainty evidence for its structural validity, internal consistency, and reliability.
items.curatedReason: 中风患者躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）的测量属性现在有高确定性证据支持其有效性和可靠性。你可以放心在临床中使用 TIS 作为中风患者躯干康复评估的核心工具，特别是其结构效度、内部一致性和可靠性。
items.titleZh: 躯干功能障碍量表在中风后应用的心测量学特性：一项采用 COSMIN 方法的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项采用 COSMIN 方法的系统综述评估了躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）在中风患者中的心理测量学特性，发现其结构效度、内部一致性和可靠性具有高确定性证据支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-certainty evidence now supports the validity and reliability of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) for stroke patients. You can confidently use TIS as a core assessment tool in stroke trunk rehabilitation, especially regarding its structural validity, internal consistency, and reliability.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告 TIS 在所有测量属性上证据的确定性等级，可能存在某些属性的证据强度较低。
items.limitationEn: The study does not explicitly report the certainty of evidence for all measurement properties of TIS, suggesting that some properties might have lower evidence strength.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: Spine. Exploratory retrospective cohort. To determine the impact of sarcopenia on adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). Sarcopenia has been show
items.curatedReason: 在颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌肉减少症（Sarcopenia）是 3 年内发生邻近节段退变的风险因素。这意味着你应在术前筛查患者的肌肉减少症情况，并考虑将其纳入术后康复管理，以降低 ASD 风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). This implies you should screen for sarcopenia preoperatively and consider it in postoperative rehabilitation management to mitigate ASD risk.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，无法确定肌肉减少症与 ASD 的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which is subject to selection bias and confounding factors, and cannot establish a causal relationship between sarcopenia and ASD.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found no significant difference in KOOS-PS and pain at 1 year post-primary total knee arthroplasty between those who received preoperative physiotherapy and those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 术前物理治疗与膝关节置换术后患者报告结局（PROMs）间的长期关联仍不明确。虽然短期可能有益，但长期来看，其对 1 年后 KOOS-PS 和疼痛的额外价值证据不足。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究发现，在初次全膝关节置换术后 1 年，接受术前物理治疗的患者与未接受者在 KOOS-PS 和疼痛方面没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: The long-term association between preoperative physiotherapy and postoperative patient-reported outcomes (PROMs) after total knee arthroplasty remains unclear. While there may be short-term benefits, evidence for additional value on KOOS-PS and pain at 1 year post-op is insufficient.
items.limitation: 这是一项注册研究，可能存在混杂因素，并且无法排除选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a registry-based cohort study, which may have confounding factors and selection bias cannot be ruled out.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 60 participants found that therapeutic massage, conventional physiotherapy, and combined treatment all improved pain, pressure pain threshold, and functional disability in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome over the short term.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩与常规物理治疗的短期效果相似，联合治疗可能带来额外益处。在考虑干预方案时，可以把按摩纳入考虑，但还需要更多证据支持其长期效果和作为独立疗法的地位。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗在肌筋膜疼痛综合征中的短期效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 60 例慢性斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，治疗性按摩、常规物理治疗以及联合治疗在短期内均能改善疼痛、压痛阈和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage shows similar short-term effects to conventional physiotherapy, with potential added benefits from combined treatment. Consider incorporating massage into intervention plans, but further evidence is needed for its long-term efficacy and standalone role.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（n=60），且只关注了短期效果，对长期疗效的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (n=60) and focuses only on short-term effects, limiting generalizability to long-term efficacy.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study of 20 Australian physiotherapists found that the WalkBack program for low back pain prevention is acceptable, but its implementation in routine practice relies on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目为预防复发性腰痛提供了基于步行的干预方案，但其在临床实践中的推广仍面临挑战。你应认识到，实施预防性项目需要充足的培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行与教育）腰痛预防项目获得物理治疗师认可，但其优化实施依赖培训、灵活性和系统性支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 名澳大利亚物理治疗师的定性研究发现，WalkBack 腰痛预防项目是可接受的，但其在常规实践中的实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program offers a walking-based intervention for recurrent low back pain prevention, but its implementation in clinical practice still faces challenges. You should recognize that implementing preventive programs requires adequate training, flexibility, and system-level support.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（n=20），且受访者均在澳大利亚执业，结果可能不具备普适性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (n=20), and all interviewed physiotherapists practice in Australia, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 1,350 patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain found that socio-cultural factors were associated with and predicted pain intensity, disability, and health-related quality of life at baseline, 3, 6, and 12 months.
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的结局有长期预测作用。在评估和制定治疗方案时，你应该考虑这些因素，因为它们可能影响疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的长期轨迹。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化预测因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 1,350 名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者进行的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素与基线、3、6 和 12 个月时的疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量相关并有预测作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Socio-cultural factors have long-term predictive effects on outcomes for patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain. You should consider these factors in assessment and treatment planning, as they may influence the long-term trajectory of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life.
items.limitation: 观察研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在未测量混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, which cannot establish causality and may have unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 11 patients and 10 physiotherapists in Norwegian primary healthcare with a CDSS (SupportPrim PT) for musculoskeletal disorders, highlighting its influence on decision-making processes.
items.curatedReason: 临床决策支持系统（CDSS）有望改善肌肉骨骼疾病的物理治疗。这项研究表明，你需要关注 CDSS 如何在诊疗过程中影响物理治疗师和患者的决策权威性，以确保技术赋能而非取代临床判断。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了 11 名患者和 10 名物理治疗师在挪威初级医疗保健中使用肌肉骨骼疾病临床决策支持系统（SupportPrim PT）的经验，强调了其对决策过程的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Clinical decision support systems (CDSS) hold promise for improving physiotherapy in musculoskeletal disorders. This study indicates you need to consider how CDSS influences the decision-making authority of both physiotherapists and patients in the clinical encounter, ensuring technology empowers rather than replaces clinical judgment.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（11 名患者和 10 名物理治疗师），且仅在挪威进行，其发现的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (11 patients and 10 physiotherapists) and was conducted only in Norway, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: NeuroRehabilitation. PurposeIndividuals with stroke have difficulty rotating their trunk and adjusting their supporting foot when negotiating spatial constraints. This study aimed to classify movement
items.curatedReason: 中风患者在通过狭窄通道时存在特定的运动模式，例如躯干旋转受限和支撑足调整困难。这提示你在设计康复方案时，应特别关注这些精细的空间协调和步态调整训练，以改善患者的通行能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke patients exhibit specific movement patterns when navigating narrow openings, such as limited trunk rotation and difficulty adjusting the supporting foot. This suggests that when designing rehabilitation programs, you should specifically focus on training fine spatial coordination and gait adjustments to improve patients' ambulation capabilities.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（23 名中风患者），且为横断面设计，无法揭示运动模式随时间的变化或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (23 stroke patients) and a cross-sectional design, preventing it from revealing changes in movement patterns over time or the effects of interventions.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: Disability and rehabilitation. This scoping review aimed to identify and map the behavior change theories, behavior change techniques (BCTs), and effectiveness of self-management (SM) interventions de
items.curatedReason: 对于神经系统疾病患者，自我管理干预的有效性正在获得更多证据支持。你可以参考这篇综述，了解目前行为改变理论和技术在提高患者功能结局方面的应用，并在临床实践中考虑纳入结构化的自我管理策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Evidence for the effectiveness of self-management interventions in neurological disorders is growing. You can refer to this review to understand the application of current behavior change theories and techniques in improving patient functional outcomes, and consider incorporating structured self-management strategies in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 综述纳入的原始研究数量不多（18 项），且侧重于描述而非量化效果，证据强度仍需更高质量的 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: The review included a limited number of original studies (18) and focused on descriptive rather than quantitative effects, so the strength of evidence still requires validation from higher-quality RCTs.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: Physiotherapy theory and practice. Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease (PwP) has shown good feasibility, adherence, and health benefits. However, the rapid shift to online format
items.curatedReason: 在线团体运动对于帕金森病患者的可行性和益处已得到验证。这份定性研究为远程康复实践提供了宝贵经验，你在设计和实施在线课程时，应关注质量、内容和可及性，借鉴同行经验提升服务水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise has proven feasible and beneficial for people with Parkinson's disease. This qualitative study offers valuable insights for telerehabilitation practice; when designing and implementing online programs, you should focus on quality, content, and accessibility, drawing on peer experiences to enhance service delivery.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（10 名专业人员），且受访者经验可能存在偏倚，其发现的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (10 professionals), and the experiences of interviewees may be biased, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 33 chronic stroke patients found that Kinesio taping plus treadmill training, Mulligan taping plus treadmill training, and treadmill training alone all improved ankle dorsiflexion, balance, ankle stability, and fall efficacy over six weeks, with significant group differences observed in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion and static balance.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性中风患者的踝关节功能和平衡训练中，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑台训练均能带来益处。你可以将这些贴扎技术作为辅助手段，整合到针对中风患者的平衡和踝关节功能康复方案中。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性中风患者平衡和踝关节生物力学效应的比较：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 33 例慢性中风患者的随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎联合跑台训练、Mulligan 贴扎联合跑台训练以及单独跑台训练，在六周内均能改善踝关节背屈被动活动度、平衡、踝关节稳定性和跌倒效能，其中踝关节背屈被动活动度和静态平衡观察到显著组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Both Kinesio taping and Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training can benefit ankle function and balance in chronic stroke patients. You can integrate these taping techniques as adjuncts into balance and ankle function rehabilitation programs for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量小（每组 n=11），且只评估了短期干预效果，对长期疗效的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (n=11 per group) and only evaluated short-term intervention effects, limiting generalizability to long-term efficacy.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRF) versus Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNF) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation from a U.S. healthcare payer perspective.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医保支付方视角看，卒中后急性期康复，入住IRF比SNF更具成本效益。这为IRF在政策和报销谈判中提供了强有力的经济学证据，你应该熟悉这些数据。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方视角评估急性卒中后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构 vs. 专业护理机构
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型从美国医保支付方视角，评估了卒中后急性期康复中，住院康复机构（IRF）与专业护理机构（SNF）的成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a U.S. healthcare payer perspective, post-acute stroke rehabilitation in Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) is more cost-effective than in Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs). This provides strong economic evidence for IRFs in policy and reimbursement discussions, and you should be familiar with this data.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型参数的准确性及假设的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study uses a decision analytic model, and its results depend on the accuracy of model parameters and the validity of assumptions.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: This correspondence highlights the need to invest in people rather than solely devices for rehabilitation, as WHO's global rehabilitation indicators shift focus from disease to functioning and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这封评论文章强调，全球康复发展需要投资于人，而不仅仅是设备。这提醒你，康复服务的核心是物理治疗师的专业技能和人员培养，而非盲目追求技术和器械。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 这封评论强调，随着世界卫生组织全球康复指标将重点从疾病转向功能和生活质量，康复需要投资于人，而非仅仅设备。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary emphasizes that global rehabilitation development requires investment in people, not just devices. This reminds you that the core of rehabilitation services lies in the professional skills and training of physical therapists, not merely the pursuit of technology and equipment.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study found high relative reliability (ICC values from 0.81 to 0.96) for digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment in 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中的高可靠性，支持其作为临床评估工具。在临床实践中，它能用于追踪疼痛敏感性变化，指导干预。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪测量终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈的可靠性研究：一项单中心可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，数字测痛仪在60名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压力痛阈评估中显示出较高的相对可靠性（ICC值为0.81至0.96）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The high reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients supports its use as a clinical assessment tool. In practice, you can use it to track changes in pain sensitivity and guide interventions.
items.limitation: 研究对象为终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果对其他类型KOA或不同人群的适用性尚需验证。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so generalizability to other KOA types or populations needs further validation.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: This observational cohort study from two Norwegian trauma centers (N=317) examined the provision and timing of early rehabilitation services for severely injured trauma patients.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心对重伤患者的早期康复介入率较低，尤其是在专科康复医师评估方面。这提示了在急性创伤康复路径中，物理治疗师可以发挥更大作用来填补评估和早期介入的空白。
items.titleZh: 创伤患者的早期康复：来自两家挪威创伤中心的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项来自两家挪威创伤中心的观察性队列研究（N=317）调查了重伤创伤患者早期康复服务的提供情况和时机。
items.curatedReasonEn: The low rate of early rehabilitation intervention for severely injured trauma patients in Norwegian trauma centers, particularly regarding specialist physiatrist assessment, suggests that physical therapists can play a greater role in filling assessment and early intervention gaps within acute trauma rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，可能存在未测混杂因素，且数据来源于挪威，结果外推至其他医疗体系时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study, potentially subject to unmeasured confounders, and its data comes from Norway, so generalizability to other healthcare systems should be cautious.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, finding lower activity in the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出较低的腓肠肌肌电活动。这提示在重返运动评估中，除了关注股四头肌和臏腱，还要重视三头肌，将其纳入康复训练目标。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的肌电活动，发现ACL重建组的活动度较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Individuals after ACLR demonstrated lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls. This suggests that in return-to-sport assessments, in addition to focusing on the quadriceps and patellar tendon, you should also prioritize the triceps surae and include it in rehabilitation training goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为对照研究，但未随机分组，且主要结局为肌电活动，非功能性表现。
items.limitationEn: This is a controlled study but not randomized, and the primary outcome was EMG activity, not functional performance.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: This qualitative study analyzed free-text responses from 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort to explore factors determining their decision to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 对ACL损伤患者重返运动决策的定性分析表明，患者心态、努力和支持是关键驱动因素。在你的重返运动指导中，除了客观功能评估，别忘了跟患者深入沟通这些主观因素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究分析了NACOX队列中112名患者的自由文本回答，以探讨决定他们前交叉韧带损伤后重返运动的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Qualitative analysis of return-to-sport decisions in ACL injury patients highlights mindset, effort, and support as key drivers. In your return-to-sport guidance, beyond objective functional assessments, remember to engage with patients on these subjective factors.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，结果反映患者主观视角，不涉及干预效果的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, reflecting patients' subjective perspectives, and does not involve quantitative evaluation of intervention effects.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey study described factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: BFRT在儿童和青少年ACL损伤患者中的临床应用仍缺乏一致性。如果你考虑在青少年患者中使用BFRT，应谨慎并与最新研究保持同步，避免过度依赖经验。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查研究描述了影响物理治疗师对前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The clinical application of BFRT in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients still lacks consistency. If you are considering using BFRT in adolescent patients, proceed cautiously and stay updated with the latest research to avoid over-reliance on anecdotal experience.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from physical therapists, potentially subject to recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporosis and a recent upper extremity fragility fracture, focusing on fall risk and fear of falling.
items.curatedReason: 骨质疏松合并上肢脆性骨折的老年患者，其跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧感常被忽视。在制定康复计划时，除了骨折本身，你必须更主动地评估并解决这些心理和功能障碍。
items.titleZh: 骨质疏松伴近期上肢脆性骨折老年人对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法与需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松伴近期上肢脆性骨折老年人对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: Older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures often have overlooked fall risk and fear of falling. When developing rehabilitation plans, you must more actively assess and address these psychological and functional impairments in addition to the fracture itself.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，通过访谈获取老年患者的主观视角和需求，不涉及干预效果的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study that gathered subjective perspectives and needs from older adults through interviews, without quantitative assessment of intervention effects.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: This single-blind RCT (N=28) compared the immediate effects of dynamic taping vs. sports taping on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）在改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面即时效果相似。这意味着你可以根据患者具体需求和对不同贴扎的耐受性，灵活选择贴扎方式。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项单盲随机对照试验（N=28）比较了动态贴扎与运动贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的即时影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) show similar immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability. This means you can flexibly choose the taping method based on the patient's specific needs and tolerance for different taping techniques.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小（28人），仅评估了即时效应，长期效果和临床意义尚待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed immediate effects; long-term efficacy and clinical significance require further research.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot non-inferiority RCT with 68 participants explored the feasibility and preliminary effects of pragmatic physiotherapy with vs. without manual therapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步随机对照试验显示，对肩袖相关肩痛患者，加用手法治疗的物理治疗方案在患者报告结局方面可能与纯运动疗法相似。这意味着手法治疗的额外价值仍需大规模研究确认，在此之前，别把手法当成不可或缺。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗联合实践性物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的疗效：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入68名受试者的初步非劣效随机对照试验，探讨了手法治疗联合实践性物理治疗与单纯实践性物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的可行性和初步疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that adding manual therapy to pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain may yield similar patient-reported outcomes compared to exercise-only approaches. This indicates that the added value of manual therapy requires confirmation by larger trials. Until then, do not consider manual therapy indispensable.
items.limitation: 本研究为预试验（pilot trial），样本量较小（68人），主要关注可行性，对疗效的探索性结果需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot trial with a small sample size (68 participants), primarily focused on feasibility, so exploratory findings on efficacy should be interpreted with caution.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study (N=30) performed cross-cultural adaptation of the PRISM into Mexican Spanish and examined its internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity in adults with post-stroke spasticity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表完成了墨西哥西班牙语的跨文化调适与初步验证。如果你在墨西哥或相关西班牙语国家执业，这个量表可能为你评估卒中后痉挛提供一个患者自评工具。其信效度还需进一步大规模研究。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX 用于卒中后痉挛：墨西哥样本的跨文化调适和初步心理测量学评估
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面试点研究（N=30）将卒中痉挛患者自评量表（PRISM）跨文化调适为墨西哥西班牙语版本PRISM-MX，并评估了其在卒中后痉挛成人中的内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PRISM-MX scale has undergone cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary validation in Mexican Spanish. If you practice in Mexico or other relevant Spanish-speaking countries, this scale may offer a patient-reported tool for assessing post-stroke spasticity. Further large-scale studies are needed to confirm its reliability and validity.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步横断面试点研究，样本量小（30名），仅评估了内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary cross-sectional pilot study with a small sample size (30 participants) and only evaluated internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in Cameroon (N=94) examined factors related to early access and adherence to physiotherapy services among children with cerebral palsy, finding 38.3% accessed early and 38.3% showed good adherence.
items.curatedReason: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗的比例较低（38.3%），依从性也不佳。虽然是发展中国家数据，但它提醒你，在任何环境下，提高早期干预的可及性和依从性都是挑战。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗及依从性：一项医院研究
items.summaryZh: 这项在喀麦隆进行的横断面研究（N=94）调查了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗服务及依从性相关的因素，发现38.3%的儿童早期接受了治疗，38.3%显示出良好依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: In Cameroon, only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early, and adherence was poor. While this data is from a developing country, it reminds you that improving accessibility and adherence to early intervention is a challenge in any setting.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面混合回顾性前瞻性研究，存在回忆偏倚风险，且仅限于喀麦隆单一地区，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional mixed retrospective and prospective study, carrying a risk of recall bias, and it is limited to a single region in Cameroon, thus limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the clinical course of a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability, where figure-of-eight taping facilitated exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 本案例报告提示，8字贴扎与康复训练结合，在年幼空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的保守治疗中可能有效。作为个案，它仅提供初步观察，而非普遍适用的证据。
items.titleZh: 8字贴扎联合康复训练治疗学龄期女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：一例病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本案例报告描述了一名12岁女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的临床过程，其中8字贴扎有效促进了运动疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report suggests that figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation may be effective in the conservative management of multidirectional shoulder instability in a school-aged karate athlete. As a single case, it offers preliminary observations rather than generalizable evidence.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，证据等级低，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report with a low level of evidence and limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of UK physiotherapists revealed a consensus on the need for adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in paediatric MSK services, indicating strong clinician support for its relevance.
items.curatedReason: 儿科肌肉骨骼领域急需有效结局量表。MSK-HQ 在成人中广泛使用，但儿科适用性评估刚开始。这项前期研究表明英国 PT 对其儿科适应性普遍支持，为下一步验证铺垫。
items.titleZh: MSK-HQ 量表在儿科肌肉骨骼护理中的适应性：一项全国性调查和理疗师焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对英国理疗师的全国性调查和焦点小组显示，临床医师普遍认为需将肌肉骨骼健康问卷（MSK-HQ）应用于儿科肌肉骨骼服务，并支持其适应性。
items.curatedReasonEn: There is a significant need for valid outcome measures in pediatric musculoskeletal care. While MSK-HQ is widely used in adults, its pediatric adaptation is nascent. This preliminary study suggests strong support from UK physiotherapists for adapting MSK-HQ for children, setting the stage for future validation.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性探索性调查和焦点小组，未进行量表实际验证。
items.limitationEn: This study is an exploratory qualitative survey and focus group, not an actual scale validation.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, focusing on how the technology has been studied across clinical tasks, study designs, and interaction conditions, rather than its effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: GPT 类 AI 在物理治疗中的应用仍是新兴领域，本综述帮你快速了解当前研究格局、主要关注点和研究方法，但请注意，它不评估 AI 的实际疗效。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的效用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的现有证据，侧重于该技术在临床任务、研究设计和交互条件中的研究方式，而非其有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The application of GPT-like AI in physiotherapy is an emerging field. This review helps you quickly grasp the current research landscape, key focus areas, and methodologies, but note it does not assess AI's actual effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本综述是范围综述，仅描绘了 ChatGPT 在物理治疗中的研究现状，未对疗效或临床实践就绪度进行批判性评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review that only maps the current research on ChatGPT in physiotherapy, without critical appraisal of effectiveness or readiness for clinical practice.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: A B-A-B single-case design study in stroke patients found that contralateral resistance handgrip exercises with the non-paretic hand immediately and sustainably reduced hand edema.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项探索性研究，提示患侧手水肿可能通过健侧手握力训练得到改善。虽然单病例设计证据级别有限，但其即时效应和持续效应的发现，为你今后在卒中患者中探索类似干预提供了新思路。
items.titleZh: 健侧手握力训练对卒中患者患侧手水肿的即时和持续效应
items.summaryZh: 一项针对卒中患者的 B-A-B 单病例设计研究发现，健侧手握力训练能即刻且持续地减轻患侧手水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study suggests that hand edema in stroke patients might be improved by contralateral handgrip exercises. Although a single-case design has limited evidence, the findings on immediate and sustained effects offer new avenues for exploring similar interventions in stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究采用单病例设计，样本量极小，外推性有限，结果需更高质量的 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-case design with a very small sample, limiting generalizability; results require validation through higher-quality RCTs.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions (TCIs) in stroke rehabilitation, synthesizing evidence from 2012-2026 across five databases.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者的过渡期护理是康复中的难点。这份范围综述帮你厘清当前过渡期干预（TCI）的组成部分和主要结局指标，有助于你理解如何更好地协调多设置康复服务。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预和结局测量：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述描述了 2012-2026 年卒中康复中过渡期护理干预（TCI）的组成部分和结局测量，整合了五个数据库的证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Transitional care for stroke patients is a challenging aspect of rehabilitation. This scoping review helps you clarify the components and main outcome measures of current transitional care interventions (TCIs), aiding your understanding of how to better coordinate multi-setting rehabilitation services.
items.limitation: 本综述是范围综述，侧重于描述和总结，未对干预措施的有效性进行批判性评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focusing on description and summarization, without critical appraisal of intervention effectiveness.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) for instruction and feedback during telehealth sessions for children with neurodevelopmental disorders.
items.curatedReason: 远程儿童神经发育障碍康复中，治疗师如何使用关注点（FOA）指导和反馈对运动学习至关重要。这项观察性研究为你提供了真实的 FOA 使用模式数据，但注意观察人数较少。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中指导和反馈的注意力焦点使用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中，对神经发育障碍儿童进行指导和反馈时使用注意力焦点（FOA）的情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: In telerehabilitation for pediatric neurodevelopmental disorders, how therapists use focus of attention (FOA) for instruction and feedback is crucial for motor learning. This observational study provides real-world data on FOA usage patterns, though note the small number of observed participants.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察研究，样本量小（6 名治疗师和 12 名客户），结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory observational study with a small sample (6 therapists and 12 clients), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 80 children with TBI in a pediatric ICU found high mobility in 56.3% of PT evaluations, with physiological instability being a key barrier to early mobilization.
items.curatedReason: 创伤性脑损伤（TBI）儿童的早期动员数据稀缺。这项研究提供了 ICU 内 TBI 儿童早期康复的基线数据（PT 高动员率 56.3%），并指出了生理不稳定等常见障碍，助你更好地规划和支持儿科重症监护的早期动员工作。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期动员的障碍与趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项对 80 名重症监护室创伤性脑损伤儿童的回顾性队列研究显示，物理治疗评估中有 56.3% 达到了高动员水平，生理不稳是早期动员的主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization data for children with traumatic brain injury (TBI) is scarce. This study provides baseline data for early rehabilitation in pediatric ICU TBI patients (PT high mobility rate 56.3%) and identifies common barriers like physiological instability, helping you better plan and support early mobilization efforts in pediatric critical care.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心回顾性队列研究，且仅统计了前 14 天的数据，存在选择偏倚和外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center retrospective cohort study, limited to the first 14 days of data, with potential selection bias and limited generalizability.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: An activity monitor, PREEMPT, was validated for use in hospitalized individuals, demonstrating accuracy in measuring stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time in healthy older adults and hospitalized patients.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 是一款针对住院患者的活动监测器，本研究验证了其在健康老年人和住院患者中的准确性和可用性。这为你选择临床活动监测设备提供了新的选项，但要注意其在广泛临床环境下的表现仍需更多数据。
items.titleZh: 住院患者活动监测器 PREEMPT 的验证
items.summaryZh: PREEMPT 活动监测器在住院患者中进行了验证，结果显示其在健康老年人和住院患者中测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐时间及活动时间方面均准确。
items.curatedReasonEn: PREEMPT, an activity monitor for hospitalized patients, has been validated for accuracy and usability in healthy older adults and inpatients. This offers a new option for clinical activity monitoring, but its performance in broader clinical settings still requires more data.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量相对较小（10 名健康老年人，46 名住院患者），且为单中心研究，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study has a relatively small sample size (10 healthy older adults, 46 hospitalized patients) and is single-center, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that 8-week group exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life in cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 针对癌症幸存者的运动康复，远程团队模式与单次现场评估和建议相比，在生活质量改善上并未显示出优越性。这提示我们在推广远程康复时，仍需关注其在核心结局上的实际效益。
items.titleZh: 癌症运动远程康复是安全的，但其改善生活质量的效果不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周的团体运动型癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面，并不优于单次现场评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: For cancer survivors, group exercise-based telerehabilitation did not show superiority over a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving quality of life. This suggests that while promoting telerehabilitation, we still need to focus on its actual benefits for core outcomes.
items.limitation: 尽管是 RCT，但癌症诊断的异质性较大，且对照组干预强度低，可能影响结果解读和外推性。
items.limitationEn: Despite being an RCT, the heterogeneity in cancer diagnoses is substantial, and the control group had low intervention intensity, potentially affecting result interpretation and generalizability.

items.title: Personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women - European Journal of Applied Physiology
items.summary: This research demonstrated that personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，在超重和肥胖老年女性中，个性化血流限制训练（BFRT）结合可变压力可改善多系统功能。这证实了 BFRT 在特殊老年人群中的有效性，为你在临床中针对这类患者设计安全、高效的阻力训练提供了坚实依据。
items.titleZh: 个性化血流限制训练在超重和肥胖老年女性中改善多系统功能
items.summaryZh: 本研究表明，在超重和肥胖的老年女性中，个性化血流限制训练（BFRT）结合可变压力可改善多系统功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that personalized blood flow restriction training (BFRT) with variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women. This confirms BFRT's effectiveness in special geriatric populations, providing a strong basis for you to design safe, effective resistance training for these patients in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限超重和肥胖老年女性，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population is limited to overweight and obese older women, so results should be cautiously extrapolated.

items.title: Genicular Artery Embolization Using Imipenem/Cilastatin vs. Microsphere for Knee Osteoarthritis (GAUCHO). 12-Month Clinical Results of a Single-blind Randomized Controlled Trial | CardioVascular and Interventional Radiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This single-blind randomized controlled trial compared genicular artery embolization using imipenem/cilastatin versus microsphere for knee osteoarthritis, reporting 12-month clinical results.
items.curatedReason: 基因动脉栓塞术（GAE）在膝关节骨关节炎中是新兴介入疗法。这个 RCT 比较了两种栓塞剂（亚胺培南/西司他丁 vs 微球），为评估 GAE 安全性和有效性提供了更多数据。作为物理治疗师，了解这类介入治疗的最新进展能帮你更好地评估患者，辅助转诊决策。
items.titleZh: 膝关节骨关节炎基因动脉栓塞术 (GAUCHO) 研究：亚胺培南/西司他丁与微球栓塞剂的 12 个月临床结果单盲随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项单盲随机对照试验比较了使用亚胺培南/西司他丁与微球作为栓塞剂对膝关节骨关节炎进行基因动脉栓塞术的效果，并报告了 12 个月的临床结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Genicular artery embolization (GAE) is an emerging interventional therapy for knee osteoarthritis. This RCT compares two embolic agents, providing more data on GAE's safety and efficacy. Understanding these advances helps you better assess patients and inform referral decisions.
items.limitation: 研究为单盲，可能存在受试者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study was single-blinded, which may introduce participant bias.

items.title: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain from a multispecialty international working group
items.summary: This article presents consensus practice guidelines from a multispecialty international working group on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain.
items.curatedReason: 这份多学科国际工作组的共识指南，明确了颈椎小关节疼痛的干预策略。它能帮你规范诊断思路、选择适宜治疗，并强化与介入疼痛科医生沟通时的专业语言。
items.titleZh: 多学科国际工作组关于颈椎小关节疼痛干预的共识实践指南
items.summaryZh: 本文发布了一份多学科国际工作组关于颈椎小关节疼痛干预的共识实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multispecialty international consensus guideline clarifies intervention strategies for cervical spine (facet) joint pain. It helps standardize your diagnostic approach, select appropriate treatments, and enhance professional communication with interventional pain physicians.

items.title: Use of Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy for the Management of Bone Pathologies: A Systematic Review
items.summary: This systematic review evaluates the efficacy and outcomes of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for various bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis, and bone stress injuries.
items.curatedReason: 这篇系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病理（如骨折、骨坏死、骨应力损伤）中的应用。它能帮助你了解 ESWT 的适用范围和证据质量，从而在临床实践中更精准地应用或推荐该疗法。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法治疗骨病理的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 本系统综述旨在评估体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在治疗包括骨折、骨坏死/缺血性坏死、骨应力损伤（BSI）、胫骨内侧应力综合征（MTSS）和骨髓水肿综合征（BMES）等骨病理方面的疗效和结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluates the use of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies (e.g., fractures, osteonecrosis, bone stress injury). It helps you understand ESWT's indications and evidence quality, enabling more precise application or recommendation in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 综述包含了不同研究设计，可能存在较高的异质性。
items.limitationEn: The review included various study designs, potentially leading to high heterogeneity.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury: individual neurophysiological and clinical responses | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study investigated individual neurophysiological and clinical responses to transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中显示出个体化的神经生理和临床反应。这提示我们，未来这种组合疗法可能为特定患者亚群带来显著改善，但需要个体化的评估和方案调整。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中和脊髓损伤中经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练：个体神经生理和临床反应
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that transcutaneous spinal stimulation combined with upper extremity robotic training elicits individualized neurophysiological and clinical responses in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury patients. This suggests that this combined therapy may offer significant improvements for specific patient subgroups, necessitating individualized assessment and protocol adjustments.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且关注个体化反应，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size and focuses on individual responses, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management: integrating network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research integrates network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets for personalizing post-stroke symptom management.
items.curatedReason: 利用网络分析和计算机模拟来个性化卒中后症状管理，为未来精准康复提供了新思路。尽管目前仍是研究阶段，但这种方法有望帮助我们识别患者亚群的特异性干预靶点，提升康复效果。
items.titleZh: 个性化卒中后症状管理：整合网络分析和计算机模拟干预以识别亚组特异性靶点
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过整合网络分析和计算机模拟干预，旨在识别亚组特异性靶点，以实现卒中后症状管理的个性化。
items.curatedReasonEn: Using network analysis and in silico interventions to personalize post-stroke symptom management offers new avenues for precision rehabilitation. While still in the research phase, this approach promises to help identify subgroup-specific intervention targets and enhance rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究主要基于模型和模拟，缺乏直接的临床干预验证。
items.limitationEn: The study is primarily based on models and simulations, lacking direct clinical intervention validation.

items.title: Directional Symptom Dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease: A Comparative Bayesian Network Analysis
items.summary: This comparative Bayesian network analysis investigated directional symptom dependencies in multiple sclerosis and Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了多发性硬化症和帕金森病中症状的方向性依赖关系，有助于我们深入理解这两种神经退行性疾病的复杂性。虽然不是直接的干预研究，但对症状网络模式的洞察能帮你优化跨学科管理策略。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症和帕金森病中的方向性症状依赖性：一项比较性贝叶斯网络分析
items.summaryZh: 本比较性贝叶斯网络分析研究了多发性硬化症和帕金森病中症状的方向性依赖性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compares directional symptom dependencies in multiple sclerosis and Parkinson's disease, deepening our understanding of these complex neurodegenerative conditions. While not an intervention study, insights into symptom network patterns can help you optimize interdisciplinary management strategies.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络分析结果可能受数据输入和模型假设的影响。
items.limitationEn: Bayesian network analysis results may be influenced by data input and model assumptions.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: This scoping review systematically reviewed exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这篇范围综述系统地审视了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告方式。它能帮助你了解现有运动干预的特点和局限，为制定更全面、个性化的康复方案提供参考。
items.titleZh: 运动员长期腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容和报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统地审查了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically examines exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes. It helps you understand the characteristics and limitations of existing exercise interventions, providing a reference for developing more comprehensive and personalized rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了它主要关注文献的广度而非深度，证据等级可能不一。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review dictates that it focuses on the breadth rather than depth of literature, and evidence levels may vary.

items.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing and Managing Pubic-Related Groin Pain in Athletes | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: This viewpoint article discusses how clinicians might approach assessing and managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这篇观点文章探讨了临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。它能提供实用的临床思路和决策框架，帮助你在面对这类复杂疼痛时，做出更明智的评估和干预选择。
items.titleZh: 令人困惑的耻骨疼痛：临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛
items.summaryZh: 这篇观点文章探讨了临床医生应如何评估和管理运动员的耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This viewpoint article explores how clinicians might assess and manage pubic-related groin pain in athletes. It offers practical clinical insights and decision-making frameworks, helping you make more informed assessment and intervention choices when facing this complex pain.
items.limitation: 作为观点文章，主要基于专家意见和临床经验，而非高等级证据。
items.limitationEn: As a viewpoint article, it is primarily based on expert opinion and clinical experience, not high-level evidence.

items.title: AI-based smart glove for hand movement recognition and rehabilitation monitoring: a systematic review | Journal of Engineering and Applied Science | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This systematic review explores the potential of AI-based smart gloves for hand movement recognition and rehabilitation monitoring.
items.curatedReason: 关于 AI 智能手套用于手部运动识别和康复监测的系统综述，展示了数字健康技术在神经康复领域的巨大潜力。作为物理治疗师，了解这类技术能帮助你探索新的康复工具，提高患者依从性和疗效追踪的精准度。
items.titleZh: 基于人工智能的智能手套用于手部运动识别和康复监测：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 本系统综述探讨了基于人工智能的智能手套在手部运动识别和康复监测方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on AI-based smart gloves for hand movement recognition and rehabilitation monitoring highlights the significant potential of digital health technologies in neurorehabilitation. As a physical therapist, understanding these technologies helps you explore new rehabilitation tools and improve patient adherence and the accuracy of outcome tracking.
items.limitation: 系统综述，纳入研究可能存在方法学异质性，实际应用效果需更多大规模临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, included studies may have methodological heterogeneity, and actual application effects require more large-scale clinical trials for validation.

items.title: Exercise, daily physical activity, and age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline: an 8-year cohort study of locomotive syndrome | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This 8-year cohort study investigated the effects of exercise, daily physical activity, and age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline on locomotive syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项长达 8 年的队列研究表明，运动和日常身体活动对老年人运动功能下降的年龄特异性累积发生率有影响。它强化了在老年康复中，持续鼓励患者保持活跃生活方式的重要性，并有助于预测跌倒和功能衰退风险。
items.titleZh: 运动、日常身体活动与运动综合征的年龄特异性活动能力下降累积发生率：一项 8 年队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项为期 8 年的队列研究探讨了运动、日常身体活动与运动综合征（locomotive syndrome）的年龄特异性活动能力下降累积发生率之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 8-year cohort study shows that exercise and daily physical activity influence the age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline in older adults. It reinforces the importance of continuously encouraging patients to maintain an active lifestyle in geriatric rehabilitation and helps predict fall and functional decline risks.
items.limitation: 观察性队列研究，可能存在未控制的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: Observational cohort study, potentially subject to uncontrolled confounding factors.

items.title: Abdominal Aortic Calcification on Lumbar X-rays Predicts Hip Fracture Risk: Study Reveals
items.summary: A study in Japan involving 1,395 patients found that abdominal aortic calcification (AAC) visible on lumbar X-rays is significantly associated with an increased risk of hip fractures in older adults, with an AAC score of 5 or higher strongly linked to fracture occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项日本研究发现，腰椎 X 射线上可见的腹主动脉钙化（AAC）可预测老年人的髋部骨折风险。作为物理治疗师，了解这一简单、低成本的生物标志物，能帮助你在评估老年患者时，更早识别高风险个体，从而更积极地进行跌倒和骨折预防干预。
items.titleZh: 研究揭示：腰椎 X 射线上的腹主动脉钙化可预测髋部骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 一项在日本进行的研究发现，涉及 1,395 名髋部骨折患者和 1,075 名对照受试者，表明腰椎 X 射线上可见的腹主动脉钙化（AAC）与老年人髋部骨折风险显著增加相关，AAC 评分达到 5 或更高与髋部骨折发生有强关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Japanese study found that abdominal aortic calcification (AAC) visible on lumbar X-rays predicts hip fracture risk in older adults. As a physical therapist, knowing this simple, low-cost biomarker helps you identify high-risk individuals earlier when assessing older patients, enabling more proactive fall and fracture prevention interventions.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性，提示相关性，但不能确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study is observational, suggesting correlation but not establishing causality.

items.title: Effect of 12-week dynamic stretching of hamstrings on joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A 12-week dynamic stretching program for hamstrings was examined for its effects on joint flexibility, muscle strength, and musculoskeletal properties in the stretched limb.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了 12 周动态腘绳肌牵伸对柔韧性和肌肉特性影响的细节。在制定训练计划时，可以参考其具体方案，但别指望一步到位，它只是长期干预中的一环。
items.titleZh: 12 周腘绳肌动态牵伸对关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究旨在探讨为期 12 周的腘绳肌动态牵伸（DS）计划对牵伸肢体的关节柔韧性、肌肉力量和肌肉骨骼特性的影响，并评估未牵伸肢体作为比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study details the effects of a 12-week dynamic hamstring stretching program on flexibility and muscle properties. Use its specific protocols as a reference for training program design, but recognize it's just one component of a long-term intervention.
items.limitation: 研究未提供非牵伸肢体的详细结果，限制了干预效果的全面评估。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide detailed results for the non-stretched limb, limiting a comprehensive evaluation of the intervention's effects.

items.title: Extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation: a conceptual review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This conceptual review synthesizes anatomical, biomechanical, and safety considerations of the extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation (RFA) in chronic axial low back pain of vertebrogenic origin.
items.curatedReason: 关于椎基底神经射频消融术 (BVN RFA) 的概念性综述，拓宽了我们对椎源性下腰痛介入治疗的理解。作为物理治疗师，理解这些介入技术背后的解剖和生物力学原理，能更好地与患者沟通并优化康复计划。
items.titleZh: 椎基底神经射频消融术经椎弓根外入路：概念性综述
items.summaryZh: 本概念性综述综合分析了椎基底神经射频消融（RFA）术经椎弓根外入路在治疗椎源性慢性轴性下腰痛方面的解剖学、生物力学和安全性考量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This conceptual review of basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation (BVN RFA) expands our understanding of interventional treatments for vertebrogenic low back pain. As a PT, understanding the anatomy and biomechanics behind these techniques helps you communicate better with patients and optimize rehab plans.
items.limitation: 这是一篇概念性综述，主要关注解剖、生物力学和安全性，缺乏直接的临床疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a conceptual review focusing on anatomical, biomechanical, and safety considerations, lacking direct clinical efficacy data.

items.title: Leisure-time physical activity and low back pain in Switzerland: results from the 2022 cross-sectional Swiss Health Survey | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A 2022 cross-sectional Swiss Health Survey investigated the association between leisure-time physical activity and low back pain in Switzerland.
items.curatedReason: 这项瑞士的横断面研究提示，休闲时间体育活动与下腰痛之间存在关联。虽然横断面研究不能建立因果关系，但它再次提醒我们，鼓励患者保持日常活动量的临床意义。
items.titleZh: 瑞士休闲时间体育活动与下腰痛的关系：2022 年瑞士健康调查的横断面结果
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 2022 年瑞士健康调查的横断面研究，旨在探讨瑞士居民休闲时间体育活动与下腰痛之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Swiss cross-sectional study suggests an association between leisure-time physical activity and low back pain. While cross-sectional data cannot establish causality, it reinforces the clinical importance of encouraging patients to maintain daily activity levels.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to establish causality.

items.title: Intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone for the treatment of vulvovaginal atrophy: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis assessed the therapeutic efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗绝经后女性外阴阴道萎缩的疗效。虽然不是物理治疗手段，但了解这种药物疗法能帮你更好地理解患者的整体治疗方案，并在必要时与医生讨论联合治疗策略。
items.titleZh: 阴道内脱氢表雄酮治疗外阴阴道萎缩：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 本系统综述和荟萃分析旨在评估阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗绝经后女性外阴阴道萎缩的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women. While not a physical therapy intervention, understanding this pharmacological option helps you grasp patients' overall treatment plans and discuss combined strategies with physicians when necessary.
items.limitation: 综述中包含的研究可能存在异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The heterogeneity of included studies in the review may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Kinesiophobia and knee biomechanical characteristics in patients with postoperative tibial plateau fractures across body mass index categories: a cross-sectional mediation analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This cross-sectional mediation analysis examined the relationship between kinesiophobia and knee biomechanical characteristics in patients with postoperative tibial plateau fractures across different body mass index categories.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了术后胫骨平台骨折患者的运动恐惧症与膝关节生物力学特征的关系，并考虑了 BMI 的影响。理解这些因素的相互作用，能帮你更全面地评估和管理这类复杂患者，特别是在制定重返运动计划时。
items.titleZh: 术后胫骨平台骨折患者不同体重指数下运动恐惧症与膝关节生物力学特征的关系：一项横断面中介分析
items.summaryZh: 本横断面中介分析探讨了术后胫骨平台骨折患者的运动恐惧症与膝关节生物力学特征之间的关系，并考虑了体重指数（BMI）类别的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the relationship between kinesiophobia and knee biomechanical characteristics in patients with postoperative tibial plateau fractures, considering the impact of BMI. Understanding these interacting factors helps you comprehensively assess and manage these complex patients, especially when developing return-to-sport programs.
items.limitation: 横断面设计限制了对因果关系的推断。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design limits causal inferences.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: ChainBMD is a deep learning framework developed for stroke evaluation and guidance, utilizing kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis.
items.curatedReason: ChainBMD 框架利用深度学习评估卒中患者的运动链图形和时间分析。这类 AI 工具的进步，可能有助于未来物理治疗师更客观、精准地评估患者运动模式和提供康复指导。
items.titleZh: ChainBMD：基于运动链图和时间分析的卒中评估与指导深度学习框架
items.summaryZh: ChainBMD 是一种用于卒中评估和指导的深度学习框架，该框架利用运动链图形和时间分析进行处理。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ChainBMD framework uses deep learning to evaluate kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis in stroke patients. Advancements in AI tools like this could help PTs provide more objective and precise assessments of patient movement patterns and rehabilitation guidance in the future.
items.limitation: 作为深度学习框架的描述，尚待临床验证和大规模应用。
items.limitationEn: As a deep learning framework description, it awaits clinical validation and large-scale application.

items.title: Stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD): technical insights and long-term outcomes | The Egyptian Journal of Neurology, Psychiatry and Neurosurgery | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research provides technical insights and long-term outcomes of stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD).
items.curatedReason: 关于帕金森病立体定向消融术的技术细节和长期疗效研究。作为物理治疗师，了解这些外科治疗的细节，能帮你更好地理解患者术后状态，并针对性地制定康复计划。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者立体定向消融术：技术洞察和长期疗效
items.summaryZh: 本研究提供了帕金森病（PD）患者立体定向消融术的技术洞察和长期疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on stereotactic ablation for Parkinson's disease (PD) provides technical insights and long-term outcomes. As a physical therapist, understanding the details of these surgical treatments helps you better comprehend a patient's postoperative status and develop targeted rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究关注外科技术，对物理治疗干预的细节阐述有限。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on surgical techniques, with limited detail on physical therapy interventions.

items.title: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This research suggests branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration through a microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了支链氨基酸（BCAA）可能通过肠道微生物丙酸依赖性机制改善帕金森病神经退行性变。虽然是基础研究，但它提示了营养干预在帕金森病管理中的潜在角色，未来可能影响跨学科康复策略。
items.titleZh: 支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性 PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 轴的恢复减轻帕金森病神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 本研究表明，支链氨基酸（BCAA）可能通过微生物丙酸依赖性地恢复 PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 信号通路，从而减轻帕金森病的神经退行性变。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals that branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) may alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration via a microbial propionate-dependent mechanism. While basic research, it suggests a potential role for nutritional intervention in Parkinson's management, possibly influencing future interdisciplinary rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 为基础研究，机制探讨而非临床干预效果，尚无法直接指导临床物理治疗。
items.limitationEn: As basic research, it explores mechanisms rather than clinical intervention effects, not yet directly guiding clinical physical therapy.

items.title: The IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with the electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke | Chinese Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study found that IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，IL-17A 调节星形胶质细胞活性可能与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关。尽管是机制研究，但它为电针干预卒中患者提供了潜在的生物学解释，支持了其在神经康复中的应用。
items.titleZh: IL-17A 调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现，IL-17A 调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针治疗后卒中患者感觉运动能力的改善有关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that IL-17A modulated astrocytic activity may be associated with electroacupuncture-mediated improvements in sensorimotor ability after stroke. While mechanistic, it provides a potential biological explanation for electroacupuncture in stroke patients, supporting its application in neurorehabilitation.
items.limitation: 为机制研究，需更多临床试验验证其在人群中的实际疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study; more clinical trials are needed to verify its actual efficacy in human populations.

items.title: Muscle oxygen saturation reflects individualized responses to exercise intensity during rowing ergometer exercise | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research demonstrates that muscle oxygen saturation (SmO2) reflects individualized responses to exercise intensity during rowing ergometer exercise.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，肌肉氧饱和度（SmO2）能反映划船测功仪运动中个体对运动强度的反应。在运动康复和表现训练中，使用 SmO2 作为个性化训练强度的指标，能帮助你更精确地调整训练负荷，优化适应性。
items.titleZh: 肌肉氧饱和度反映划船测功仪运动中个体对运动强度的反应
items.summaryZh: 本研究表明，肌肉氧饱和度（SmO2）能够反映个体在划船测功仪运动中对运动强度的个性化反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that muscle oxygen saturation (SmO2) reflects individualized responses to exercise intensity during rowing ergometer exercise. In sports rehabilitation and performance training, using SmO2 as an indicator for personalized training intensity helps you more precisely adjust training loads and optimize adaptations.
items.limitation: 研究对象特异性，结果可能不完全适用于所有类型的运动和人群。
items.limitationEn: The study's specific subject population may limit the generalizability of its findings to all types of exercise and populations.

items.title: Study protocol for FAXAge: a randomized, controlled clinical trial of fasting and exercise to slow aging in humans | GeroScience | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study protocol describes FAXAge, a randomized, controlled clinical trial of fasting and exercise aimed at slowing aging in humans.
items.curatedReason: FAXAge 研究方案描述了一项随机对照临床试验，旨在通过禁食和运动来延缓人类衰老。虽然是协议阶段，但它提示了未来运动疗法在抗衰老领域的潜力，可能为老年康复提供新的理论依据。
items.titleZh: FAXAge 研究方案：一项旨在通过禁食和运动延缓人类衰老的随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案描述了 FAXAge 项目，这是一项旨在通过禁食和运动来延缓人类衰老的随机对照临床试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: The FAXAge study protocol describes a randomized controlled clinical trial designed to slow human aging through fasting and exercise. Although currently in the protocol phase, it suggests the future potential of exercise therapy in anti-aging, possibly providing new theoretical foundations for geriatric rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究尚处于协议阶段，未发布实际结果。
items.limitationEn: The study is currently in the protocol phase, with no actual results published yet.

items.title: Relatively upstream factors associated with pressure injury occurrence and staging in older hospitalized patients: a prospective observational study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This prospective observational study identified relatively upstream factors associated with pressure injury occurrence and staging in older hospitalized patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究识别了住院老年患者压疮发生和分期的上游相关因素。作为物理治疗师，理解这些宏观风险因素能帮助你更全面地评估患者，并在压疮预防方案中，不仅关注局部压力管理，还应考虑全身性因素。
items.titleZh: 住院老年患者压疮发生和分期相对上游因素的前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究旨在识别住院老年患者压疮发生和分期过程中相对上游的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study identifies upstream factors associated with pressure injury occurrence and staging in older hospitalized patients. As a physical therapist, understanding these macro-level risk factors helps you comprehensively assess patients and consider systemic factors in addition to local pressure management in pressure injury prevention protocols.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，不能直接证明因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, cannot directly prove causation.

items.title: Bouldering-related trauma: Injury patterns and operative burden over 10 years at a UK major trauma centre - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This 10-year study at a UK major trauma center analyzed injury patterns and operative burden related to bouldering-related trauma.
items.curatedReason: 这项在英国创伤中心进行的 10 年研究揭示了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。对于运动康复师而言，了解这些损伤风险能更好地指导预防策略和康复流程。
items.titleZh: 抱石相关创伤：英国主要创伤中心 10 年的损伤模式和手术负担
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 10 年在英国主要创伤中心进行的研究，分析了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year study from a UK major trauma center reveals bouldering-related trauma patterns and operative burden. For sports rehabilitation therapists, understanding these injury risks helps guide prevention strategies and rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 为回顾性观察研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据记录不完整。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective observational study, it may have selection bias and incomplete data recording.

items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了任务经验是否会调节下落跳（drop jumps）中的习惯化效应，并分析了其内部和日间可靠性及测量误差。在运动表现评估和训练中，理解测试的可靠性和习惯化效应能帮你更准确地解读数据，优化训练安排。

Understanding test reliability and habituation effects in sports performance assessment and training helps you interpret data more accurately and optimize training schedules.
