items.limitationEn: The study's sample size and population specificity may limit the broad applicability of its results.

items.title: Gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and its relationship with countermovement jump performance differ between male academy soccer players and control participants | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study investigated differences in gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and its relationship with countermovement jump performance between male academy soccer players and control participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，男性足球学院运动员的腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构和反向跳（countermovement jump）表现的关系与对照组不同。这提示我们，针对特定运动员群体，应考虑其肌肉结构特点来优化力量训练和表现评估。
items.titleZh: 男性足球学院运动员的腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构及其与反向跳表现的关系与对照组不同
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在调查男性足球学院运动员（ASP）和年龄、性别匹配的对照组参与者之间，腓肠肌内侧（GM）肌肉特性及其与反向跳（CMJ）表现的关系差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that the relationship between gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and countermovement jump performance differs between male academy soccer players and control participants. This suggests that for specific athlete populations, strength training and performance assessment should be optimized by considering their muscle structural characteristics.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限男性足球学院运动员，结果外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population is limited to male academy soccer players, so results should be cautiously extrapolated to other populations.

items.title: The longitudinal analysis of the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate using bioimpedance: A case study - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This case study conducted a longitudinal analysis of the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate using bioimpedance.
items.curatedReason: 这项病例研究探讨了压缩衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率的纵向影响，并使用生物电阻抗进行测量。虽然是单一病例研究，结果不能普适，但它为运动恢复领域的个性化监测提供了思路，特别是对精英运动员的精细管理有启发意义。
items.titleZh: 压缩衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率影响的生物电阻抗纵向分析：一项病例研究
items.summaryZh: 本病例研究通过生物电阻抗技术对压缩衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率的纵向影响进行了分析。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case study investigates the longitudinal effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate, measured by bioimpedance. While a single-case study with non-generalizable results, it offers insights into personalized monitoring in sports recovery, particularly for fine-tuning elite athlete management.
items.limitation: 单一病例研究，结果不具普遍性。
items.limitationEn: Single case study, results are not generalizable.

items.title: Fracture Risk Following Hardware Removal in Children With Arthrogryposis
items.summary: This study aimed to identify the incidence of fracture and infection following hardware removal in children with arthrogryposis after lower extremity long bone osteotomy, comparing it to a matched cerebral palsy cohort.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了关节挛缩症儿童在硬件移除后的骨折和感染风险，并与脑瘫患者进行了比较。这对于儿科物理治疗师而言，意味着在术后康复中需特别关注这类儿童的骨骼健康和并发症预防，优化负重和活动策略。
items.titleZh: 关节挛缩症儿童硬件移除后的骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在确定关节挛缩症儿童在下肢长骨截骨术后硬件移除的骨折和感染发生率，并与匹配的脑瘫患者队列进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the risk of fracture and infection in children with arthrogryposis after hardware removal, compared to children with cerebral palsy. For pediatric physical therapists, this means paying special attention to bone health and complication prevention in these children during postoperative rehabilitation, optimizing weight-bearing and activity strategies.
items.limitation: 为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, confounding factors may exist.

items.title: Training Early Childhood Educators to Observe, Assess and Enhance Discrete Play Skills | Early Childhood Education Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This intervention study described how early childhood teachers were trained to observe, assess, and enhance discrete sensorimotor, functional, and symbolic play skills through the DiscoveryScape Play Training (DSPT) professional development course.
items.curatedReason: 这项干预研究描述了如何通过专业发展课程培训早期教育者观察、评估和提升儿童的离散游戏技能。作为儿科物理治疗师，了解这种培训模式能帮你更有效地与教育者合作，共同促进儿童发育，尤其是在早期干预中。
items.titleZh: 培训早期教育者观察、评估和提升离散游戏技能
items.summaryZh: 这项干预研究描述了 39 名早期教育教师如何通过完成 DiscoveryScape 游戏培训（DSPT）课程，学会观察、评估和提升儿童的离散感觉运动、功能和象征性游戏技能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This intervention study describes how early childhood educators were trained to observe, assess, and enhance discrete play skills through a professional development course. As a pediatric physical therapist, understanding this training model helps you collaborate more effectively with educators to promote child development, especially in early intervention.
items.limitation: 研究关注教师培训效果，而非儿童的直接康复结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on the effectiveness of teacher training, not direct rehabilitation outcomes for children.

items.title: Predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F With PediaTracTMv3.0 Motor and Social/Communication/Cognition Domains | Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study investigated the use of PediaTracTMv3.0 Motor and Social/Communication/Cognition Domains in predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F results.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/交流/认知领域在预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 结果中的作用。这种早期筛查工具的进步能帮助儿科物理治疗师更早识别发育迟缓风险，从而启动早期干预。
items.titleZh: 使用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/交流/认知领域预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 结果
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在探讨 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/交流/认知领域在预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 结果中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the role of PediaTracTMv3.0 motor and social/communication/cognition domains in predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F results. Advances in such early screening tools can help pediatric physical therapists identify developmental delay risks sooner, enabling early intervention.
items.limitation: 预测模型的准确性和特异性尚需更广泛验证。
items.limitationEn: The accuracy and specificity of the predictive model still require broader validation.

items.title: Executive function development between ages 2 and 6 in children exposed to threatened preterm labor | European Child & Adolescent Psychiatry | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study examined executive function development between ages 2 and 6 in children exposed to threatened preterm labor.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了有早产威胁暴露史的儿童在 2 到 6 岁期间执行功能的发展。了解这些儿童可能存在的发育轨迹，能帮助儿科物理治疗师更精准地评估其认知和运动发展，并制定相应的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 早产威胁暴露儿童 2 至 6 岁执行功能发展
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了暴露于早产威胁的儿童在 2 到 6 岁期间执行功能的发展情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines executive function development in children exposed to threatened preterm labor between ages 2 and 6. Understanding the potential developmental trajectories in these children helps pediatric physical therapists more accurately assess their cognitive and motor development and formulate appropriate intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是执行功能，并非直接的运动康复结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on executive function, not direct motor rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: WhatsApp as a Support Tool for Reducing Anxiety and Improving Quality of Life After Orthognathic Surgery | Journal of Maxillofacial and Oral Surgery | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study investigated WhatsApp as a support tool for reducing anxiety and improving quality of life after orthognathic surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，WhatsApp 作为支持工具能有效降低正颌手术后患者的焦虑并提高生活质量。这提示我们，在术后康复管理中，利用即时通讯工具提供心理支持和信息反馈，能有效辅助患者的整体恢复。
items.titleZh: WhatsApp 作为正颌手术后降低焦虑和改善生活质量的支持工具
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了 WhatsApp 作为一种支持工具，在降低正颌手术后患者焦虑并改善其生活质量方面的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that WhatsApp as a support tool effectively reduces anxiety and improves quality of life for patients after orthognathic surgery. This suggests that using instant messaging tools for psychological support and feedback in postoperative rehabilitation management can effectively aid patients' overall recovery.
items.limitation: 主要关注心理结局和生活质量，非直接物理康复效果。
items.limitationEn: Primarily focused on psychological outcomes and quality of life, not direct physical rehabilitation outcomes.
